# CWE-209 positive: error text includes database details (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-209-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-209 Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
// Vulnerable line: returns driver error verbatim to client.
func InsertReservation(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	ref := r.FormValue("ref")
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO reservations(ref) VALUES(?)", ref)
	if err != nil {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": fmt.Sprintf("db failure: %v", err)})
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "created"})
}
